title: Incense Sticks Gift Set, 180 Joss Incense Stick and Holder Set with 9 Fragrances, 50Min Burn Time, Multipack Scented Sticks with Holder for Relaxation, Meditation, Aromatherapy, Yoga, Home
features: Incense Sticks Gift Set with 9 Natural Fragrance: This incense stick set contains 180 scented sticks, encompassing 9 natural scents including Lavender, Jasmine, Rose, Lemon, Mint, Vanilla, Sandalwood, Eucalyptus and Rosemary(20 sticks of each). Each scent is blended from natural ingredients, delivering richly layered and authentic aromas.

Diverse Scents Adapt to Different Scenarios: From refreshing lemon and mint to rich sandalwood and rose, each joss sticks of different scent can bring you a different emotional experience. Whether you want to refresh yourself with lemon scent at work or aid sleep with lavender before bed, you'll find a fragrance option to enjoy a diverse aromatherapy experience.

Natural Ingredients, Long-lasting Burn: These incense joss sticks are made with natural ingredients and do not release harmful substances when burning, allowing you to immerse yourself in the fragrance of nature. Each joss incense stick is 25cm long and can burn for 50 minutes, continuously creating a aromatic atmosphere for you.

Incense Sticks and Holder Gift Set: Joss incense sticks can be used in aromatherapy, spas, yoga, weddings, meditation, relaxation, and more. The incense stick gift set includes an exquisitely designed wooden holder with moon and star decorations. It not only safely holds the burning incense sticks, preventing ash from falling, but also serves as a decorative piece to any space.

Perfect Gifts: This scented stick and holder set purifies the air and soothes the mind and body. Whether in a meditation room, office, or bedroom, the fragrance releases a pleasant aroma, creating a calming atmosphere. This incense sticks set with a wooden holder is a ideal gift for friends and family on housewarming days, Christmas, and other special occasions.
